home.newsForYouSubtitle: Matched by your crop, state, and district when available.
home.noNewsBody: We are checking trusted agriculture sources. Useful updates will appear here shortly.
home.weatherLoadingBody: Add taluka, district, and state in your profile for accurate forecasts.

heavy_rain.recommendation: Avoid pesticide spraying and keep drainage channels open.

rain.recommendation: Delay spraying and fertilizer application until the rain window passes.

heatwave.recommendation: Irrigate early morning or evening and avoid mid-day spraying.

strong_wind.recommendation: Support vegetable creepers and avoid field spraying in windy hours.

whitefly_risk.message: High humidity can increase whitefly risk in cotton.
whitefly_risk.recommendation: Inspect leaf undersides and avoid excess irrigation.

rice_drainage.message: Rain may increase water levels in rice fields.
rice_drainage.recommendation: Maintain bunds and drain excess water from young seedlings.

vegetable_wind_risk.message: Vegetable crops may face wind damage.
vegetable_wind_risk.recommendation: Check staking, trellis support, and nursery covers.

safe_weather.recommendation: Continue normal field monitoring and irrigation planning.

insights.avoidSpray: Avoid pesticide spray before expected rain.
insights.sprayOk: Spray window looks manageable if wind stays low.
insights.humidityHigh: High humidity means closer pest and disease scouting is needed.
insights.humidityOk: Humidity risk is moderate right now.
insights.heatHigh: Plan irrigation during cooler hours to reduce heat stress.

danger.openApp: Open the app and act immediately. Emergency crop protection steps are recommended.

message.green: Weather conditions are favorable for {crop} today.
message.yellow: Weather is changing. {crop} may need closer monitoring today.
message.red: High danger weather is expected. {crop} may face serious crop damage risk.

intelligence.rainWindow: Rain risk increases around {time}. Avoid spraying near this window.
intelligence.noRainWindow: No strong rain window detected in the next 12 hours. Keep monitoring before pesticide or fertilizer work.
intelligence.heatRisk: {crop} may lose moisture faster. Prefer evening irrigation and avoid afternoon spraying.
intelligence.heatSafe: Heat stress risk is low right now. Continue normal irrigation planning.
intelligence.safeAction3: Review crop-stage farming tips for the next operation.

heatwave.title: Extreme heat risk detected
heatwave.message: {crop} may face moisture stress because temperature may reach {value}.
heatwave.recommendation: Use light irrigation in the evening or early morning. Avoid pesticide spraying during peak afternoon heat.

irrigation.title: Irrigation planning needed
irrigation.message: {crop} is near its heat tolerance level.
irrigation.recommendation: Check soil moisture and schedule irrigation outside hot afternoon hours.

heavy_rain.title: Heavy rain may affect field work
heavy_rain.message: Rain chance is high and {crop} may face waterlogging or spray loss.
heavy_rain.recommendation: Avoid pesticide and fertilizer spraying. Clean drainage channels before rain starts.

rain.title: Light to moderate rain possible
rain.message: Rain may interrupt spraying or fertilizer work.
rain.recommendation: Plan field operations after the rain window and monitor soil moisture.

strong_wind.title: Strong wind crop damage risk
strong_wind.message: {crop} may face lodging, leaf tearing, or support damage during strong winds.
strong_wind.recommendation: Support vegetable creepers, sugarcane, and young plants. Avoid spraying in windy hours.

pest_risk.title: Whitefly and fungal risk in cotton
pest_risk.message: High humidity can increase whitefly attacks and fungal disease risk in cotton.
pest_risk.recommendation: Inspect leaves carefully this week, improve field aeration, and avoid excess irrigation.

humidity.title: High humidity disease risk
humidity.message: High humidity can increase fungal disease risk in {crop}.
humidity.recommendation: Inspect leaves carefully this week, improve field aeration, and avoid excess irrigation.

frost.title: Low temperature crop stress risk
frost.message: {crop} may face cold stress because temperature may drop near {value}.
frost.recommendation: Protect seedlings, avoid late evening irrigation in frost-prone fields, and cover nursery beds where possible.

uv_stress.title: High UV and plant stress risk
uv_stress.message: Strong sunlight can increase moisture loss from soil and crop leaves.
uv_stress.recommendation: Plan irrigation early and avoid transplanting or spraying during harsh sunlight.

safe_weather.title: No major crop-weather risk now
safe_weather.message: Current forecast does not show a major danger for your selected crop.
safe_weather.recommendation: Continue normal field monitoring and follow crop-stage based farming tips.
